description: Eval gate for a single-chain Euler backfill via createPortalHistoricalSync against Portal. Mirrors the proxy harness's gates (benches/replay/gates/cold-start.json) but asserted on the fork's own behavior.

client_facing_503_529.rationale: fork self-paces to Portal CU/worker economics; must never surface worker-pool exhaustion

client_facing_timeouts.rationale: range-scan latency is normal, not a failure

logical_streams_per_chain.rationale: discovery + data = 2 streams for a full backfill (vs proxy's tens of thousands of getLogs)

streams_per_1000_blocks.rationale: proxy path was 3-10; fork target <1 amortized

forward_progress_blocks_pct.rationale: must complete the requested range (proxy died at 0%)
